case_title: EFHRAIM KHALFHY ET AL VS. LESLIE BEN-SIMON ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALFHY, EFHRAIM
ORDER REGARDING ORDER TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) GRANTED
CORRESPONDENCE REQUEST FOR EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS CASE#:850033 BE USED IN CURRENT CASE (#850688) FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE (SET FOR 11/23/15 @ 1L:30AM). RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF KHALFHY, ROCHELLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $74.00 SERVED AUG-25-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEN-SIMON, LESLIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LESLIE BEN-SIMON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-01-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF REQUESTING THAT TRIAL EXHIBITS BE RETAINED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALFHY, EFHRAIM KHALFHY, ROCHELLE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KHALFHY, EFHRAIM KHALFHY, ROCHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT BEN-SIMON, LESLIE STASCHOWER, KAAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $35.0 SERVED JUL-29-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STASCHOWER, KAAREN
RETURN MAIL - REJECTION LETTER SENT TO PLAINTIFF , UNABLE TO FORWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALFHY, ROCHELLE
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED AND GIVEN TO CLERK IN DEPT. 506.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ROCHELLE KHALFHY WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL EXCEPT PLAINTIFF EFHRAIM KHALFHY WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE IN COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHALFHY, EFHRAIM KHALFHY, ROCHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STASCHOWER, KAAREN $3,705.03 PRINCIPAL, $184.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,889.03, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST LESLIE BEN-SIMON IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
